'''shayoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacationer|vacationer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacationer|vacationer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shayoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyeheth|shæyeheth]] || [[word:shæyehej|shæyehej]] || [[word:shæyehesh|shæyehesh]] || [[word:shæyehe|shæyehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayoyohoth|shayoyohoth]] || [[word:shayoyohoj|shayoyohoj]] || [[word:shayoyohosh|shayoyohosh]] || [[word:shayoyoho|shayoyoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayohoth|shayohoth]] || [[word:shayohoj|shayohoj]] || [[word:shayohosh|shayohosh]] || [[word:shayoho|shayoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayofhoth|shayofhoth]] || [[word:shayofhoj|shayofhoj]] || [[word:shayofhosh|shayofhosh]] || [[word:shayofhof|shayofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayohotho|shayohotho]] || [[word:shayohojo|shayohojo]] || [[word:shayohosho|shayohosho]] || [[word:shayohoko|shayohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayohoth|shayohoth]] || [[word:shayohoj|shayohoj]] || [[word:shayohosh|shayohosh]] || [[word:shayoho|shayoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayohothol|shayohothol]] || [[word:shayohojol|shayohojol]] || [[word:shayohoshol|shayohoshol]] || [[word:shayohokol|shayohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayohothotho|shayohothotho]] || [[word:shayohojojo|shayohojojo]] || [[word:shayohoshosho|shayohoshosho]] || [[word:shayohoko|shayohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayohothon|shayohothon]] || [[word:shayohojon|shayohojon]] || [[word:shayohoshon|shayohoshon]] || [[word:shayohokon|shayohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayohothoro|shayohothoro]] || [[word:shayohojoro|shayohojoro]] || [[word:shayohoshoro|shayohoshoro]] || [[word:shayohokoro|shayohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
